title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; available on npm as ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain partner package adding Ollama LLM and embeddings support; pip install langchain-ollama.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file import, RAG, admin panel); runs in Docker.

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive terminal UI for chatting with Ollama models; built with Python Prompt Toolkit.

title: ollama-copilot (cmiller01/ollama-copilot)
summary: Lightweight GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-rag (glangchain/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ready for PDF ingestion.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama; Maven Central artifact ollama4j.

title: ollama-rs (pepperoni21/ollama-rs)
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API; crates.io/ollama-rs.

title: ollama-discord (daxton/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-host Discord bot that streams Ollama answers in chat; configurable slash commands.

title: ollama-helm (ollama-webui/ollama-helm)
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama and Ollama-WebUI on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-nvim (nomnivore/ollama-nvim)
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor or explain code using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-dagger (dagger/ollama-dagger)
summary: Example Dagger pipeline that spins up Ollama and runs model tests inside CI.

title: ollama-streamlit (rlancemartin/ollama-streamlit)
summary: Streamlit chat app that lets users pick local Ollama models and chat via the REST API.

title: ollama-curl (defunkt/ollama-curl)
summary: Collection of copy-paste curl snippets for every Ollama REST endpoint.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-integrations)
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async/await and streaming; NuGet OllamaSharp.

title: ollama-rust (mdrokz/ollama_rs)
summary: Another community Rust SDK for Ollama with Tokio and streaming support; crates.io/ollama_rs.

title: ollama-huggingface (huggingface/ollama-benchmarks)
summary: HF space that benchmarks Ollama models for speed & memory and posts leaderboards.
